title: Clarifying Questions: [ui:flow-graph] improve agent flow o11y
description: The PM Agent needs a few details before researching your idea.

currentGaps.title: What specific observability gaps exist in the current flow-graph? What's hard to see or debug today?

primaryUseCase.title: Is this primarily for real-time monitoring while agents run, or post-mortem debugging after completion?

dataDepth.title: How much detail should be visible by default vs expanded on demand?
enum: Summary view with expand-on-click for details
Dense view showing all data upfront

steps.title: Details
steps.description: This is an internal UI improvement for visualizing agent execution flows. Agent observability patterns (traces, state visualization, timing) are well-established and the implementation will be specific to the existing flow-graph component and agent data model. No external research needed.

response.dataDepth: Summary view with expand-on-click for details
